title: TerraMine
description: Adds most of if not everything from Terraria into Minecraft (WIP)
body:
TerraMine is yet another mod that tries to add Terraria into Minecraft. Very WIP right now but I do plan to add everything that makes sense to add and in a way that matches Minecraft and Terraria

Currently includes:

  • New mobs
  • Corruption and Crimson biomes
  • Many new blocks
  • 89 accessories
  • Armours, Weapons, and Explosives
  • Floating Islands and Dungeon (WIP)
  • A Mana system
  • Vanity System (for armor and accessories, includes dyes)
  • Magic Missile (and variants)
  • Various other things
  • Mod Compatibility:
    • LambDynamicLights
    • LambdaBetterGrass
    • Continuity

Dependencies:

  • Architectury
  • Cloth Config
  • Fabric API
  • TerraBlender


Updates may be slow at times due to this being my first mod and being busy.
